introSection: Ratón Vacilón Con Gato Comilón is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned & travelled by Spanish carnival operator Bañuls Attracciones.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster was present at Feria de Abril in Seville, Spain for an unknown period of time.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This spinning wild mouse has orange track with green supports.

fullText:
Ratón Vacilón Con Gato Comilón is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned & travelled by Spanish carnival operator Bañuls Attracciones.

This roller coaster was present at Feria de Abril in Seville, Spain for an unknown period of time.

This spinning wild mouse has orange track with green supports.
